results.title: Fixed lint and type-check errors in transport/admin metrics
results.content: Resolved ruff failures by moving admin API imports to the top, removing unused test imports, and returning the computed tool-by-client/tool-by-name metrics instead of leaving dead assignments. Resolved mypy failures in build_transport by normalizing a nullable cache to an LRUCacheProvider fallback before constructing transports that require a non-null ICacheProvider. Verified with env UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache make lint.

results.title: Phase 4.4 continuity contract and envelope
results.content: Implemented a shared continuity contract in src/minder/continuity.py and wired it into session restore, memory recall, workflow guard, and graph workflow planning/reasoning. Session restore now returns continuity_packet with instruction_envelope + session_brief; memory recall is step-aware; workflow guard reports violations and deterministic envelopes; query workflow planner injects the envelope/brief into reasoning prompts. Verified with uv run pytest tests/unit/test_continuity_tools.py tests/unit/test_nodes.py tests/unit/test_session_client_flow.py tests/integration/test_tools.py.

results.title: Closed Phase 3 with acceptance gate and runtime-safe test fixes
results.content: Implemented tests/integration/test_phase3_gate.py to close Minder Phase 3. The gate verifies multi-hop cross-references across code and docs, hybrid retrieval MRR improvement, knowledge-graph repo relationships, real local git-repo ingestion, MCP resources/prompts, and graph-enriched workflow guidance. Also fixed a latent mypy issue in code_splitter, changed server runtime_summary to avoid probing llama_cpp at boot, switched stdio startup to FastMCP's async runner, and made SSE round-trip skip when sandbox policy forbids localhost bind. Verified with ruff, mypy, and full pytest: 233 passed, 14 skipped.

results.title: Order test suite stale expectations after enum and repository changes
results.content: Fixed three failing CRM tests caused by stale test expectations, not production regressions. StatusEnumTest now expects the added QUOTE status and total enum count 5. OrderRepositoryImplTest now mocks findByIdAndProviderFtgIdAndDeletedAtIsNull instead of findById, matching the repository's tenant-aware and soft-delete-aware contract for get/update/not-found paths. Verified with targeted order tests and full ./gradlew test.

results.title: Paused Phase 01.1 smoke coverage work
results.content: Paused rental-management-ui during Phase 01.1 Plan 01.1-03 after creating a WIP checkpoint commit. Added Vitest as the minimal smoke-test runner, created vitest.config.ts and a yarn test script, drafted shared API/session smoke tests under src/lib/api/__tests__/client.test.ts and src/lib/auth/__tests__/session.test.ts, patched src/lib/api/client.ts so protected 401 responses clear the stored access token, and wrote .planning/HANDOFF.json plus .planning/phases/01.1-api-integration-contract-and-typed-data-layer/.continue-here.md for resume context. The work is intentionally paused before running yarn test, so the next action is to run the new test suite, fix any mocking or assertion failures, then continue with contract-gap TODOs and final lint/build verification.
